2603.21975.title: SecureBreak -- A dataset towards safe and secure models
2603.21975.paper_summary: Large language models are becoming pervasive core components in many real-world applications. As a consequence, security alignment represents a critical requirement for their safe deployment. Although previous related works focused primarily on model architectures and alignment methodologies, these approaches alone cannot ensure the complete elimination of harmful generations. This concern is reinforced by the growing body of scientific literature showing that attacks, such as jailbreaking and prompt injection, can bypass existing security alignment mechanisms. As a consequence, additional security strategies are needed both to provide qualitative feedback on the robustness of the obtained security alignment at the training stage, and to create an ``ultimate'' defense layer to block unsafe outputs possibly produced by deployed models. To provide a contribution in this scenario, this paper introduces SecureBreak, a safety-oriented dataset designed to support the development of AI-driven solutions for detecting harmful LLM outputs caused by residual weaknesses in security alignment. The dataset is highly reliable due to careful manual annotation, where labels are assigned conservatively to ensure safety. It performs well in detecting unsafe content across multiple risk categories. Tests with pre-trained LLMs show improved results after fine-tuning on SecureBreak. Overall, the dataset is useful both for post-generation safety filtering and for guiding further model alignment and security improvements.
2603.21975.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型正逐漸成為許多現實應用中的核心組件。<lb/>因此，安全對齊成為其安全部署的一項關鍵要求。<lb/>儘管先前相關工作主要集中於模型架構和對齊方法，但僅靠這些方法無法確保完全消除有害生成的可能性。<lb/>這一擔憂因越來越多的科學文獻而加強，這些文獻顯示，攻擊行為，如越獄和提示注入，能夠繞過現有的安全對齊機制。<lb/>因此，需要額外的安全策略來提供對訓練階段獲得的安全對齊的穩健性質量反饋，並創建一個“終極”防禦層，以阻止可能由已部署模型產生的不安全輸出。<lb/>為了在這種情況下做出貢獻，本文介紹了SecureBreak，一個以安全為導向的數據集，旨在支持開發AI驅動的解決方案，以檢測由於安全對齊中的殘餘弱點而引起的有害LLM輸出。<lb/>該數據集因為仔細的手動標註而具有高度可靠性，標籤的分配是保守的，以確保安全性。<lb/>它在檢測多個風險類別中的不安全內容方面表現良好。<lb/>對預訓練LLM的測試顯示，在SecureBreak上微調後取得了更好的結果。<lb/>總體而言，該數據集對於生成後的安全過濾和指導進一步的模型對齊及安全改進都非常有用。
2603.21975.author: Marco Arazzi et.al.
2603.21975.authors: Marco Arazzi, Vignesh Kumar Kembu, Antonino Nocera
